name: Sizzling Beef Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Worcestershire sauce or soy sauce
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------
MARINADE-------------------------
1. Trim the skirt steak to remove all fat and gristle.
2. Place the meat in a shallow glass dish or plastic bag.
3. Combine the marinade ingredients: garlic, lime juice, Worcestershire sauce or soy sauce, chili peppers, apple cider vinegar, beef broth, safflower oil, and season with salt and pepper.
4. Marinate for about 3 hours in the refrigerator.
About 45 minutes before serving:
1. Clean the grill surface and rub it with an oil-dampened cloth.
2. Preheat the grill for about 30 minutes.
3. Remove the meat from the marinade, reserving all juices.
4. Sprinkle the meat and season with salt and pepper; place on the grill.
5. Baste with marinade, then grill until medium rare, about 5-6 minutes total, or until desired doneness.
6. Remove from heat, cover with foil, and keep warm.
To serve:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the onions and cook until browned but still crisp; remove and set aside.
3. Add bell peppers to the skillet and sauté about 2 minutes; remove and add onions back in.
4. Preheat the oven to 450°F (232°C).
5. Wrap tortillas or pita breads in foil and heat until warm, 8-10 minutes; microwave for 15-25 seconds per tortilla if needed.
6. Put the skillet back on high heat until hot, then add the meat strips.
7. Sizzle the meat immediately, turning once to create a sizzle with reserved juices or additional oil.
8. Add onions and peppers on top; pour reserved juices over for another sizzle.
9. Carry the skillet to the table; squeeze lime juice over the fajitas.
10. Serve in tortillas, enclosing meat strips, peppers, onions, pico de gallo, guacamole, and sour cream.
Makes 8 servings.
